sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50790" key="i(ppolexh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππο-λεχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n50790.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having given birth to a horse</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Δηώ</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:42:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.42.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
